phase_dir: fix/logic branch — no GSD phase dir (post-milestone UAT fixes)

completed_tasks.name: Issue 1 — Market listing real-time status updates
completed_tasks.summary: Added bet:status_changed and bet:resolved socket listeners to MarketsPage; invalidates ['markets'] query on event so listing refreshes without a page click

completed_tasks.name: Issue 2 — Deadline resolution delay (~5 min)
completed_tasks.summary: Changed check_auto_resolution beat from crontab(minute=*/5) to schedule=60.0 (every 60s); eliminated double-hop by calling _process_auto_resolution inline instead of re-enqueuing a task

completed_tasks.name: Issue 3 — Browser notification click navigates to market
completed_tasks.summary: Added onclick handler to new Notification() for resolution_due, bet_resolved, bet_disputed — calls window.focus() + router.push(/markets/{bet_id}); restructured handler order so showBrowserNotification is defined first

remaining_tasks.name: Human UAT test — verify all 3 fixes with docker compose up --build

human_actions_pending.action: Run docker compose up --build and perform UAT for all 3 issues
human_actions_pending.context: (1) Open /markets in two tabs, wait for deadline — listing should update without clicking through; (2) status change should appear within ~1 min of deadline; (3) allow browser notifications, click one, confirm it opens the market detail page

decisions.decision: 60-second polling interval for check_auto_resolution instead of 5-minute crontab
decisions.rationale: crontab(*/5) fires at fixed clock minutes so worst case is ~5 min wait; schedule=60.0 fires every 60s from last run — max delay ~1 min

decisions.decision: Inline resolution in check_auto_resolution instead of re-enqueueing resolve_market_at_deadline
decisions.rationale: Removed double-hop (sweep enqueues task → worker picks up) which added extra queue latency. _process_auto_resolution has idempotency guard (status == open check)

next_action: Run docker compose up --build; test all 3 issues; if UAT passes, commit all files and update .planning/phases/05-intelligence-resolution/05-HUMAN-UAT.md test 4 result to 'pass' and status to 'resolved'
context_notes: Branch: fix/logic. All 5 GSD phases complete. Post-milestone UAT session for phase 05. Outstanding UAT item was test 4 (Socket events reach browser from Celery). User ran manual test and found 3 sub-issues which are now fixed in code but not yet committed. The page.tsx homepage tagline change was already present before this session.
